results.title: JNJ's Market share relative to its competitors, as of Q1 2026
Top Johnson and Johnson Competitors and Alternatives | Business Strategy Hub

summary_raw: Key competitors: Pfizer, Merck, Novartis (top 3), plus AbbVie, Amgen, GSK, BMS, AstraZeneca, Roche, Lilly. GSK Q1 beat on specialty medicines. Merck and BMS also delivered Q1 updates. JNJ's Q1 revenue beat peers with 10% YoY growth; competitor Stelara biosimilar launches (AbbVie, Amgen) are pressuring JNJ's legacy revenue. JNJ acquired Halda Therapeutics ($3B) in Nov 2025 to bolster pipeline against competitor innovation.
